title: Shell injection in chunk_convert.py
description: subprocess.run with shell=True and user-supplied folder paths.
recommendation: Use argument list, not shell string

title: Path traversal in server.py file upload
description: file.filename used directly in os.path.join without sanitization.

title: AWS credentials as CLI defaults
description: file_to_s3.py has placeholder credentials visible in help text.

title: GPL-3.0 license constrains adoption
description: Copyleft license requires derivative works to be GPL. Commercial license available separately.
recommendation: Pattern extraction only, no code import

title: LLM API keys not masked in errors
description: API keys passed to services without masking in error messages.

title: Model artifacts downloaded without verification
description: Models from models.datalab.to loaded without signature or checksum verification.
recommendation: Add integrity verification for model downloads

title: Over-broad exception catching
description: 47 try/except blocks mostly catch generic Exception. No custom exception hierarchy.

title: 50% community health
description: No CONTRIBUTING, no CODE_OF_CONDUCT, no SECURITY.md. CLA only.

title: No PDF size limits or timeout protection
description: Processing untrusted PDFs without size validation or processing timeouts.
recommendation: Add file size limits and processing timeouts

title: 403 open issues
description: High issue count relative to 27 contributors.

title: Excellent benchmark methodology
description: 7-method comparison, 2 scoring approaches, published HuggingFace dataset.

title: Clean 3-stage pipeline architecture
description: Provider -> Processor -> Renderer with 6 extension points and dependency injection.
